scenarios.name: teacher blank mission draft does not erase persisted missions
scenarios.invocation: static source assertion plus runtime persistence-boundary check
scenarios.observable: update/add handlers do not call normalizeAuctionMissions; shared snapshot uses getPersistableAuctionMissions; blank draft returns last persisted nonblank mission list instead of []

scenarios.name: teacher explicit mission delete can persist empty
scenarios.observable: empty mission list with no blank draft returns [] so the delete button path can persist deletion

scenarios.name: student Supabase mode does not render stale local missions
scenarios.invocation: static source assertion on AuctionPage initialization and load-failure branch
scenarios.observable: initial missions are [] when isSupabaseSettingsEnabled; remote failure calls setAuctionMissions([]); local-only branch still reads localStorage
